div.p: 20 bytes minimum, up to 60 bytes with options

g.text: Byte number of first data byte
Valid only when ACK flag set
Flow control: bytes sender can transmit
Scaled by wscale option if present
Valid only when URG flag set
Kind 0 | 1 byte | End of Options List
Max segment size peer can receive

div.p: Network Byte Order: All multi-byte fields transmitted big-endian. Use ntohs()/ntohl() on receive, htons()/htonl() on send.
Data Offset Calculation: header_len = (hdr->data_off_res >> 4) * 4 Options start at byte 20, payload at header_len.
Flags Access: flags = hdr->flags (byte at offset 0x0D) Check with bitwise AND: if (hdr->flags & TCP_FLAG_SYN)
Checksum: Must zero checksum field before calculating. Covers pseudo-header (src/dst IP, protocol, TCP length) + TCP header + data.
